HANPURE Rechargeable LED Light gloves are fingerless gloves with 2 brights LED beads built into the fingers. They make searching, repairing, wiring, and working in dark places so much easier. Cool and practical gifts for people with everything! Unique gifts for guys, men, dad, husband, teenagers who like night fishing, hiking, camping, or working on a car. Also cool gifts for women, mom, wife who likes drawing, knitting, or DIY. Birthday Gifts, Valentines Day Gifts, Fathers Day Gifts, Mothers Day Gifts, Christmas Stocking Fillers Gifts for just about anyone! Why LED Light Gloves? Sometimes you may be working on something that requires you to use both hands, and it's already dark where you can’t hold a flashlight, or need someone to hold a light for you. It may be doing some tasks in the garage, under sinks, inside engines, or wiring inside your house. Hands-Free LED Light Gloves can actually be a real help in these cases as the light they produce is more directed and more convenient. Top Features: Light-up LED gloves (for right hand and left hand) Easy ON / OFF button Rechargeable Battery-powered (Includes USB charging cable) Built-in 2 ultra bright LED beads on the index finger and thumb Max output up to 50 lumens Adjustable wrist closure Made of high breathable comfortable elastic fabric The led light gloves for hiking, camping, fixing, repairing, wiring, and more Cool gifts for men who often works on car, or repairs in house. Unusual gadgets for his toolbox. Ultra Thin, Soft and Comfortable The LED light gloves don't hinder your finger movements when working, finishing, repairing or DIY. It's absolutely an useful tool gadget, or a cool gift to your loved ones. Premium Wrist Strap The adjustable wrist strap helps the LED flashlight glove around the wrist and easily fits for most people. The men who receives your gift will be happy to add this to his toolbox and appreciate your gift. Charging Port with Dust Cap The flashlight gloves are powered by a rechargeable lithium battery that users can easily power up using the Type-C port. The charging port is covered with a rubber cap which can prevent dust and water, so the item will last longer. It's waterproof for raindrops, or water splash, but don't submerge it to avoid damage. Ready to Use (1)1 Pair LED Gloves (Left and Right) with USB charging cable (2) Gifts wrap (3) One storage pouch. Noted: The LED gloves with lights is only waterproof for rain drops or water splashes but can't be submerged under water.
